name: command
description: A searchable command palette: filter-as-you-type over grouped items, full keyboard navigation (Up/Down skip disabled + wrap, Home/End, Enter selects, Escape closes), empty state, optional icons and shortcuts. WAI-ARIA combobox + listbox with aria-activedescendant. Search icon via the vendored Lucide map. Light-DOM Lit; often composed inside <lv-dialog> as a command-dialog.
docs: Register <lv-command> by importing components/ui/command.ts from your entry point. Pass `items` as { value, label, group?, icon?, shortcut?, keywords?, disabled? }[] (icon = a vendored Lucide name; keywords add synonyms to the filter). Listen for `lv-select` (chosen item value) and `lv-escape` (user pressed Escape). For a command-dialog, render <lv-command> inside <lv-dialog open> and close the dialog on lv-select / lv-escape.
